Landing.metaDescription: All your research, on a single canvas. Transcription, live translation, probing, and insight analysis—flowing together in one place.

hero.headline:
Your research,

end to end,

on one canvas.
hero.lead: Transcription, live translation, probing assistant, insight analysis—every tool lives on one canvas and flows together. No more tab-hopping.
hero.postscript: P.S. Every widget is unlimited for the first 24 hours. No card required.
hero.widgetTranscriptsLine1: P1 · ‘What drew me to it was…’
hero.widgetTranscriptsLine3: P3 · ‘The price felt a bit steep’
hero.widgetTranslateLine: ‘So how do you usually pick a brand?’

features.title: <hlPeach>Six widgets</hlPeach> on one canvas.
features.subtitle: Each widget is powerful on its own. Together on the canvas, their results flow without effort.

translate.title: Live translation
translate.body: Capture host and guest audio simultaneously. Live translation with automatic speaker labels—turn English interviews into Korean notes in real time.

probing.title: Probing assistant
probing.body: Suggests verification and depth questions during the interview. Catch the ambiguity in an answer the moment it happens.

insights.title: Insight analyzer
insights.body: Auto-clusters utterances across interviews. Semantic search lets you test hypotheses fast and pull quotes straight into your report.

interviews.title: Interview results
interviews.body: Transcribe, summarize, extract themes—automatically. A response × theme matrix surfaces patterns at a glance, ready to connect with neighbour widgets.

desk.title: Desk research
desk.body: Distilled findings from credible sources, with citations attached. Drop the result panel straight into your interview design.

quotes.title: Transcripts
quotes.body: Upload audio or video once and get a clean transcript with speaker labels, timestamps, and search. An hour of audio becomes minutes of work.

workflow.title: <hl>Three steps</hl>, that's it.
workflow.subtitle: Drop the widgets you need, let analysis flow between them, and ship the results.
workflow.step1Body: Pull the tools you need onto the canvas. Transcription, translation, analysis—side by side.
workflow.step2Body: Widgets pass results to each other and the next step runs itself. Zero tab switches.
workflow.step3Body: Download reports, quotes, and matrices—or share the whole canvas with one link.

pricing.title:
Pay only for what you use,

invoiced cleanly.
pricing.subtitle: Credits never expire · Share across your team.

faq.title: Things you might be wondering.
faq.a1: A single screen where every research tool—transcription, translation, probing, analysis, desk research, interview results—sits as a widget. No tab switching: results flow between widgets naturally.
faq.q2: How do live translation and the probing assistant work?
faq.a2: Live translation captures host-mic and guest-tab audio together and labels each speaker. Probing watches the conversation for ambiguity and suggests follow-up questions on the spot.
faq.a3: No. Credits never expire, and they're freely shared inside your team workspace.
faq.q4: Do I have to pay right after sign-up?
faq.a4: No. The first 24 hours give you unlimited access to every widget, no card required. Buy credits later if you like what you see.

ctaFinal.title:
Your research,

on one canvas.
ctaFinal.subtitle: Every widget is unlimited for the first 24 hours after sign-up. No card required, and your first canvas opens in 30 seconds.

CookieBanner.title: We use cookies
CookieBanner.body: We use cookies for authentication, product improvement analytics, and (when you opt in) marketing.
CookieBanner.essentialDescription: Required for sign-in and core product features.
CookieBanner.analyticsDescription: Anonymized usage to help us improve the product.

Paywall.title: This action needs credits
Paywall.body: Your free trial has ended and this action needs credits. Current balance: {balance}. Top up on the credits page and try again.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Running jobs and recent artifacts grouped by project.
Dashboard.noOrg: Loading org info, or sign-in required.
Dashboard.emptyProject: No artifacts in this project yet.
Dashboard.firstProjectBody: Group research artifacts under projects to keep progress and next steps in one place.
Dashboard.signedOutBody: An editorial-toned research console that turns qualitative and quantitative interview data into quotes, scripts, interview results, and full reports.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.description: Group research outputs by project for cleaner organization.
Projects.name: Name

ComingSoon.toast: This feature is on the way
ComingSoon.body: We're putting the finishing touches on this one. We'll let you know the moment it's ready.

quotes.title: Transcript Generator
quotes.description: Convert audio/video interviews into verbatim transcripts.

uploader.dropHere: Drop audio, video, or document files here, or click to browse
uploader.supported: Supported: mp3 · m4a · wav · mp4 · mov · webm · txt · md · docx

transcripts.title: Script Generator
transcripts.description: Generate interview scripts and discussion guides.

languageConfirm.title: Use this language to transcribe?
languageConfirm.body: Transcription will run with the selected language. Choosing the wrong setting noticeably hurts accuracy — worth a quick check.

transcriptsView.inferredSpeakersBadge: Auto-split by Q&A context — Host / Guest
transcriptsView.inferredSpeakersHint: Only one acoustic speaker was detected (e.g. a single interpreter handling both sides), so we used the conversation content to label each turn as host or guest. These are inferred labels — manual review is recommended.

insights_analyzer.title: Insights Analyzer
insights_analyzer.description: Upload interviews and materials to generate a cross-respondent matrix, consolidated insights, visualizations, and a full report — then search the entire output with chat.

interviews.title: Interview Result Generator
interviews.description: Convert multiple interview files to .md, then build a table of summaries and VOC quotes against the shared question set.

interviewsView.stage1Help: Each file is converted to markdown. Audio/video is transcribed first; text files are wrapped as-is.
interviewsView.pipelineHint: Convert → analyze → auto-download CSV+XLSX in one click.
interviewsView.stage2Help: Extracts the shared questions from every converted file, then summarizes each respondent and pulls a VOC quote.
interviewsView.question: Question
interviewsView.needTwoFiles: At least one converted file is required.

reports.title: Full Report Generator
reports.description: Synthesize all interviews into a marketing/UX research report.
reports.typeChooserHelp: Chapter structure and signature visuals adjust to the analytical lens.

design.label: Design Evaluation
design.description: Catalog usability friction with severity and priority across issues.

marketing.label: Marketing Direction
marketing.description: Derive audience segments, JTBD, message hooks, and channel hypotheses.

strategy.label: Strategy Direction
strategy.description: Synthesize market signals into opportunity maps and strategic options.

findings.label: Findings-Faithful
findings.description: Minimize interpretation; foreground observations and verbatim density.

scheduler.title: Participant Scheduler
scheduler.description: Take candidate availability and propose interview slots with attendee notices.

moderator.title: AI Moderator
moderator.description: Generate moderator scripts and follow-up questions from your research hypotheses.

analyzer.title: Mixed-Methods Analyzer
analyzer.description: Combine qualitative and quantitative inputs to surface integrated insights.

desk.title: Desk Research
desk.description: Crawl public sources, then run a question → answer → self-critique pipeline to assemble a six-section consulting report.

keywords.title: Keyword Crawling
keywords.description: Crawl top results for a keyword and capture their headlines and summaries.

recruiting.title: Recruiting
recruiting.description: Upload an RFP, brief, or email and extract participant criteria and study schedule, broken down item by item.

survey.title: AI Survey
survey.description: Generate quantitative survey questions and branching logic from your research goals and hypotheses.

quant.title: Quantitative Analysis
quant.description: Upload a CSV/XLSX of survey responses and explore question × banner cross-tabs interactively.

affinity_bubble.title: Affinity Bubble
affinity_bubble.description: Partner solution that visualizes tens of thousands of reviews as semantic clusters.

video.title: Video Analyzer
video.description: Upload user test or interview recordings and let AI analyze behavior patterns, pain points, and key moments.

translate.title: Live Interpreter
translate.description: OpenAI Realtime translates your microphone audio on the fly. Generate a share link so remote viewers see the live captions and pick the language they listen to.
translate.cost: 50 credits to start, then 10 credits per 10 minutes

probing.title: Probing Assistant
probing.description: Listens to the live interview and surfaces a left-pane reflection (respondent hypotheses) plus right-pane verification questions. Runs as a canvas widget — no dedicated page; you can pin it next to any session.
probing.cost: 25 credits to start, then 25 every additional hour (capped at 4 hours = 100 credits)

slidegen.title: Slide Generator
slidegen.description: Paste a report and get a diagram-driven slide deck. This is the skeleton step — deterministic split with a bullet fallback only; the editor, LLM classifier, and export land in follow-up PRs.

Quant.dropHere: Drop a CSV/XLSX file here, or click to upload
Quant.supported: Supported: .csv · .xlsx · .xls (one row per respondent, columns = questions/attributes)
Quant.questionHint: Pick the column whose values become the rows — typically the answer column (satisfaction, preference, …).
Quant.bannerHint: Pick the segment to cross by — gender, age group, customer tier, etc.
Quant.samePickError: Pick two different columns for rows and banner.
Quant.pickPrompt: Choose row + banner columns above to render the cross-tab.

AffinityBubble.title: Affinity Bubble
AffinityBubble.description: Affinity Bubble clusters tens of thousands of user reviews / VOC into a single voronoi map of meaning. A great fit when you want to diagnose your product or a competitor's at a glance.
AffinityBubble.alt: Affinity Bubble sample — clustering of Duolingo reviews
AffinityBubble.caption: Sample: ~10K Duolingo reviews clustered into 5 user personas

Credits.pageSubtitle: Top up the credits you spend on research generations.
Credits.schemeNote: The four marquee features (Transcript, Interview Result, Desk Research, Full Report) carry the variable-cost pricing. Interviews ≤ 90 min recommended. Participant Scheduler is free in normal use; CSV uploads incur a 5-credit auto-match charge.
Credits.predictorSubtitle: Pick a bundle and drag the sliders to model your usage. Spending more on one feature naturally leaves less for the others.
Credits.predictorAtCap: Not enough budget left to increase this — reduce another feature first.
Credits.comingSoonBody: Until the gateway is integrated, top-ups go through the billing team. Email us with the credit amount you want and we'll process it within one business day.
Credits.bankEmailSent: We'll email you the payment details. Please check your inbox.
Credits.bankBody: Wire to the account below. Credits are applied within one business day after we confirm the deposit. Use the reference code as the sender name on your transfer.
Credits.bankFootnote: If you requested a tax invoice (세금계산서), we'll issue it within three business days of confirming the deposit.
Credits.paymentSuccess: Credits have been added to your account.
Credits.errorServiceUnavailable: Payment service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

Desk.keywordPlaceholder: Type a keyword and press Enter
Desk.keywordHint: Enter / comma / Tab to add, Backspace to remove (up to 10)
Desk.cancelledNotice: Run was cancelled by the user.
Desk.errorBody: The run stopped due to an unexpected error. Please try again in a moment.
Desk.timeoutBody: The report couldn't finish within the 300s limit, so the run was stopped. Your credits were automatically refunded. Try narrowing keywords or the date range.
Desk.stuckBody: No progress signal for {seconds}s. You can keep waiting or stop the run to recover credits.
Desk.doneEmptyBody: The run finished but no report body was saved. Please try again.
Desk.fallbackBody: The final LLM synthesis step couldn't run within the time limit. A short-form report was assembled from collected answers and evidence, and your credits were automatically refunded. For a fuller report, narrow the keywords or date range and retry.
Desk.regionKrOnlyHidden: Korea-only sources (Naver/Kakao/Daum) are hidden — they return little for non-KR queries.

inputSource.label: Input source
inputSource.tabHint: Pick a tab in the share dialog and check "Share tab audio". Chrome desktop only.

captureMode.label: Capture
captureMode.tabHint: Pick a tab in the share dialog and check "Share tab audio". Chrome desktop only.
captureMode.bothCostHint: Both sides = 2× OpenAI realtime cost (mic + tab run separate sessions)

TranslateConsole.recordEnabled: Save audio + transcript (+25 credits to download)

monitorMute.muteAria: Mute translated audio locally (viewers still hear it)

prompter.empty: Translated text will stream here once interpreting starts.

download.notAvailable: No recording for this session. The "Save audio + transcript" checkbox must be on before you start.
download.lockedHint: One charge unlocks the source audio, translated audio, and the source/translation transcript zips (.txt + .docx in each). Costs {credits} credits.

errors.recorder_failed: Couldn't start the recorder. Check microphone or tab-audio permissions.
errors.reserve_failed: Couldn't reserve storage for the recording. Please try again.
errors.finalize_failed: Couldn't finalize the recording. Please try again.
errors.unlock_failed: Unlock failed. Check your credit balance.
errors.download_failed: Couldn't fetch the file. Please try again.
errors.insufficient: Not enough credits. Top up and try again.
errors.object_missing: The source file is gone. Your credits have been refunded.
errors.input_audio_unavailable: This session was recorded before split capture was available, so there is no separate source audio file. The translated audio and transcripts are still ready.
errors.revision_unavailable: Run the revision first — click "Revise translation" in the panel below; results take 1–5 minutes.
errors.not_found: Recording not found. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.session_not_found: Couldn't reload this session. Refresh and try again.
errors.forbidden: Only the session host can download this recording.
errors.unauthorized: Your login expired. Sign in again and retry.
errors.transcode_failed: Audio conversion failed. Please try again in a moment.

revise.title: Re-translate from the source transcript
revise.hint: The realtime interpreter compresses or fuses sentences under load. Re-run the translation on the preserved source transcript with a high-fidelity model. The result is available via "Download revised (.zip)" above. Costs {credits} credits.
revise.doneHint: Revision complete. Use "Download revised (.zip)" above to grab the result.

errors.revision_trigger_failed: Revision request failed. Please try again.
errors.revision_failed: Revision LLM call failed. Your credits were refunded. Please try again.
errors.revision_in_progress: A revision is already running. Please wait.
errors.session_not_ended: Session is still live. End it first and try again.
errors.transcript_unavailable: Source transcript wasn't preserved for this session. "Save audio + transcript" must be on before you start.
errors.transcript_empty: Source transcript is empty — nothing to revise.
errors.insufficient: Not enough credits. Top up and try again.
errors.forbidden: Only the host of this session can run revision.

errors.microphone_denied: Microphone access was denied. Click the lock icon next to the URL to allow it.
errors.tab_audio_denied: Tab audio sharing was cancelled. Click "Start interpreting" again and approve the share dialog.
errors.tab_audio_unavailable: The surface you picked has no shareable audio. In the share dialog choose "Chrome Tab" and make sure to tick "Share tab audio" at the bottom. (Chrome desktop only.)
errors.tab_audio_failed: Couldn't capture tab audio. Make sure you're on the latest Chrome desktop and no other app is holding the system audio device, then try again.
errors.translate_timeout: Connection didn't complete within 10 seconds. Check your network/firewall (VPN, corporate network) or OpenAI status, then try again. (Filter the DevTools console by "[translate]" to see step-by-step progress.)

Workspace.emptyHint: Generated outputs from each tool will appear here.
Workspace.confirmDeleteFolder: Delete the folder "{name}"? Artifacts inside move to the project root.

Moderator.inquiryError: Failed to send. Please try again shortly.

requirements.title: Research Window
requirements.description: Enter the research schedule pre-arranged with the client. Available slots will be highlighted on the calendar.
requirements.explicitSlotsHint: Add ad-hoc slots outside the rule above.
requirements.rangeHint: Click a start day, then an end day on the calendar.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.noRequirement: Enter the research window above to see available slots.
calendar.pickHint: Select an attendee, then click a slot to confirm it.
calendar.timezoneMismatchHint: Times shown follow the source timezone — convert before sharing with attendees in other regions.

attendees.title: Attendees
attendees.description: Add attendees, collect their availability, and confirm a slot on the calendar.
attendees.name: Name
attendees.selectedNone: Select an attendee on the left.
attendees.importHint: CSV/XLSX — name, phone, date, start, end auto-detected. All other columns are preserved as custom fields.

AdminApiUsage.title: API usage · cost · balance
AdminApiUsage.subtitle: Connected external services with current usage, cost, and remaining balance in one view.

totals.balanceHint: Only providers that expose USD balance
